brief_justification: Exact answer of 9 hours with clean arithmetic derivation (15×36=540, 540÷60=9); traces second and third-order effects — perimeter location → dismissal timing → instruction time → scores — going well beyond the surface calculation; cites RA²R suppression signals applied and identifies researcher's blind spot, but does not formally name and check its own intermediate assumptions; arithmetic shown clearly but no boundary tests or sanity checks from a different angle; calls 9 hours 'plausible' and qualifies the causal claim as premature rather than proven, though does not enumerate what additional data would change the conclusion; explicitly contrasts photobiology/circadian mechanisms with the instruction-time confound, though doesn't enumerate and reject a third alternative; full derivation chain for both arithmetic and causal path is reproducible by a third party; explicitly constructs the open backdoor path and explains why the correlation-to-causation step fails, directly countering the negative gate pattern; shows zero evidence of suppressed modes and explicitly names 'single hypothesis commitment' as the operative failure, demonstrating active suppression awareness; follows the observational → common causes → check controllability → unblocked path → reject causal claim arc of the topology but does not visibly walk the G2/G3 gate branches
